articles.headline: Cognizant Buys Astreya for About $600M to Expand AI Infrastructure Services
articles.summary: Cognizant acquired Astreya for around $600 million to bolster AI infrastructure, data center services, and enterprise networks. This move signals IT services firms deepening involvement in corporate AI buildouts, offering businesses opportunities to outsource physical AI operations amid rising infrastructure demands. It impacts planning for AI scaling and vendor partnerships.

articles.headline: 5 Business Technology Trends Leaders Can't Ignore in 2026
articles.summary: Agentic AI and robotics-as-a-service are maturing, enabling SMEs to automate processes and physical tasks without heavy capital investment. Examples include reduced service visits via IoT and Amazon sharing robotics tech, cutting labor costs in retail, manufacturing, and construction. This drives operational efficiency and scalability without added headcount.

articles.headline: 10 Technology Trends That Will Impact Companies in 2026
articles.summary: Industrial IoT with real-time connectivity via affordable sensors and 5G enables predictive maintenance and ERP integration in production and logistics. Businesses gain efficiency in asset monitoring and environmental control, reducing downtime and costs. This trend supports operational resilience for manufacturers and distributors.
